[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001000010 2
1 100100000 2
2 000000100 1
3 111001000 4
4 101101011 6
5 111111111 a
6 001010000 2
7 110111011 7

01 10 101101011 6 match 4
12 21 001010000 2 match 6
23 32 000010000 1
34 43 000101010 3
45 54 000101100 3
56 65 000001100 2
67 76 001001000 2
70 07 101001000 3

02 20 001000000 1
13 31 110111011 7 match 7
24 42 001000000 1
35 53 100101000 3
46 64 001001100 3
57 75 100001000 2
60 06 001001000 2
71 17 111001000 4 match 3

03 30 100101011 5
14 41 001101110 5
25 52 000000000 a
36 63 000001000 1
47 74 001001000 2
50 05 100101000 3
61 16 001001100 3
72 27 001000000 1

04 40 001101010 4
15 51 100101100 4
26 62 001000000 1
37 73 110001000 3
